raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jezkabs dewe Eesa- 
wam Matli/ un to Lehzu-Wirru- 
mu/ un tas ehde un dsehre/ un 
zehtahs/ un gahje prohjam. Ta 
nizzinaja Eesaws favu Pirm- 
dsunschanas-(Teeju.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "TA XXVI. Nodalla.
Ihsaaks no-ceek vreelsch Baddu pee Abimeleku to 
Wihlistero Kehninu us Geraru: 1. Deews 
apsohla wixnam to Semmi Kanään: 2. 
Sakka favu Seewu essam favu Mahju: 6. 
Tadehl tohp winch us Abimeleka islam 
mahts: 8. Un no tahs Semmes Eedsih- 
woťajeem isdsihts/ sawas leelas Baggatibas 
pehzl: 12. darra pa Gallam pehz ilgas 
Bahrschanas to Afku deht ar Abimeleku we- 
na Derlibu: 26.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N.Bads bija tai Sem- 
mē/ pahr to pirrnaju 
Baddu/ kas Ahbrāāma 
Laikā bija/ un Ihsāāks nogahje 
nhs Abimeleku/to WihlistexuKeh- 
ninu Gerarā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS rahdi- 
jahs winnam un fazzija: Ne no- 
eij uhs Egiptu / mihti tai Sem- 
mē/ ko es tew fazzifchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Effi Sweechineeks schinni 
Semmē/un es buhschu ar tewun/ 
un es swehtischn tew/jo tew/ un 
tawan Dsimnumam dohscut es 
wiffas schahs Seītes/ un apstip- 
ri纳斯chu to Swehrecfchann / fo 
es tawan Tehwam Ahbrāāmam 
swehrejis estnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es wairofschu tawn 
Dsimmunu / ka tahs Debbes 
Swaisgnes / un dohscu tawan 
Dsinnamam wiffas schahs Sem- 
mes/ un zaar tawn SEHRLU
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "taps wiffas Semmes Tauta- 
fivehtitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz/ ka Ahbraāms man- 
nat Balti irr paklausigs bijis/ 
un turrejis mannas Pawehlescha- 
nas/ Gestahdijunnus/ Likkunnus 
un Banflbas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta mitte Ihsāāks Gerarā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahs Weetas Zilwekt 
waizaja pahr winna Seewu / un 
winch fazzija : ta irr manna 
Mahfa/ jo winch bihjajahs faz- 
ziht/ ta irr manna Seewa/ ka ne 
jaschu (fazzija tas) tahs Weetas 
Zilweki mann nokanij Rebekkas 
deht/ jo tai bija skaists Gihmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad winch ilgu Laiku tur 
bij dsihwojis / tad stattijahs Abi- 
meleks to Wihlistexu Kehnisch 
zaur Lohgu/un reds/Ihsaāks glat- 
moja ar favu Seewu Rebeklu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja Abimeleks to 
Ihsāāku/un fazzija: Itt teeschain/ 
raugi/ ta irr tawa Seewa / ka effi 
tu tad fazzijis / ta irr manna 
Mahfa / un Ihsaāks fazzija us 
to : tapehz/ ka es ejumi fazzijis/ ka 
man winnas deht jaschu ne ja- 
mirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Abimeleks : ka 
efi tu mums fcho darrijis/ gann 
drihs buhtu weens no scheein Laut- 
dim warrejs pee tawas Seewas 
gulleht/ tad buhtu tu weenn No- 
seegumu pahr muns weddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Abimeleks pawehleja 
wiffeem Laudim / fazzidans: 
Ras fcho Wihru/ jeb winna See- 
wu aiskarr/ tas taps teeschain no-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
